# Contents

# Overview

I want a forest arc!  I want to tell a story inside a forest!

<aside>
💡

Why is it so hard?  Because I’m a perfectionist and I don’t have any precedents for the kind of forest story I want to tell…

</aside>

# Forest home

The forest arc should revolve around James’ and Adelle’s [Forest home](Forest%20home%2021758e628ba280248beedbd19dd9792d.md).

# Jane Austen forest

[Jane Austen countryside](Forest%20arc/Jane%20Austen%20countryside%2013758e628ba280f28cd6d54f56e04bc4.md)

# Premise and impetus

Tying the forest arc to the main storyline: I want James and Adelle to temporarily take up residence in a forest.  But why would?

The reason at the front of the line is that it is part of a work job for James.  His agency assigns him to the forest to accomplish some task.
